# Project: To-Do List App

- Single self-contained index.html (HTML + CSS + JS in one file)
- Save tasks to localStorage; never add a backend
- Keep the neon hacker theme; rounded buttons, gradients
- Plain JavaScript only — no frameworks
- For small tasks, attach the specific `#file:` path and keep changes scoped to that file
- Follow `copilot-instructions.md` rules when working in this repo
